member.name: T:Universe.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to specify the partition key for a Cosmos DB entity.

member.name: P:Universe.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute.Sequence
member.summary: Gets the partition key sequence number.

member.name: P:Universe.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute.KeyName
member.summary: Gets the name of the partition key.

member.name: M:Universe.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified partition key.

member.name: M:Universe.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified partition key.
member.param: The partition key sequence number (1-3).
The name of the partition key.

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder
member.summary: Builder for constructing a single cluster of Catalyst conditions. Used inside Orbit.Cluster(c => ...) lambdas.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Catalyst(System.String,System.Object,Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator,System.String)
member.summary: Add a filter condition to this cluster.
member.remarks: Azure Cosmos DB column names are case-sensitive. When a naming policy is configured on , column names are automatically transformed to match the serialized document field names.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.And
member.summary: The next condition will be joined with AND.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Or
member.summary: The next condition will be joined with OR.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Eq(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Equality: column = value

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.NotEq(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Inequality: column != value

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Gt(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Greater than: column > value

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Gte(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Greater than or equal: column >= value

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Lt(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Less than: column < value

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Lte(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Less than or equal: column <= value

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Like(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: LIKE pattern matching

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.NotLike(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: NOT LIKE pattern matching

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Defined(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check if property is defined on the document

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.NotDefined(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check if property is NOT defined on the document

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.In(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Check if document's array field contains a scalar value

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.NotIn(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Check if document's array field does NOT contain a scalar value

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Contains(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Check if a collection contains the document's scalar field value

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.NotContains(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Check if a collection does NOT contain the document's scalar field value

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.Len(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Array length check

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.VectorDistance(System.String,System.Single[],System.String)
member.summary: Vector distance search

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.FTContains(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Full-text contains single keyword

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.NotFTContains(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Negated full-text contains

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.FTContainsAll(System.String,System.String[],System.String)
member.summary: Full-text contains ALL keywords

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.NotFTContainsAll(System.String,System.String[],System.String)
member.summary: Negated full-text contains all

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.FTContainsAny(System.String,System.String[],System.String)
member.summary: Full-text contains ANY keyword

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.NotFTContainsAny(System.String,System.String[],System.String)
member.summary: Negated full-text contains any

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder.FTScore(System.String,System.String[],System.String)
member.summary: Full-text relevance scoring

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.AggregationOption
member.summary: Represents a column aggregation.
member.param: The name of the column to aggregate.
The aggregate function to apply to the column.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.AggregationOption.#ctor(System.String,Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Aggregate)
member.summary: Represents a column aggregation.
member.param: The name of the column to aggregate.
The aggregate function to apply to the column.

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.AggregationOption.Column
member.summary: The name of the column to aggregate.

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.AggregationOption.Aggregate
member.summary: The aggregate function to apply to the column.

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.ColumnOptions
member.param: List of column names to be part of the query
Adds DISTINCT in the generated query
Only select the specified number of top rows
List of aggregates to be applied to the query. If aggregates are specified, the query will be grouped by the columns.
Options for joining a sub-collection.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.ColumnOptions.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Universe.Builder.Options.AggregationOption},Universe.Builder.Options.JoinOptions)
member.param: List of column names to be part of the query
Adds DISTINCT in the generated query
Only select the specified number of top rows
List of aggregates to be applied to the query. If aggregates are specified, the query will be grouped by the columns.
Options for joining a sub-collection.

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.ColumnOptions.Names
member.summary: List of column names to be part of the query

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.ColumnOptions.IsDistinct
member.summary: Adds DISTINCT in the generated query

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.ColumnOptions.Top
member.summary: Only select the specified number of top rows

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.ColumnOptions.Aggregates
member.summary: List of aggregates to be applied to the query. If aggregates are specified, the query will be grouped by the columns.

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.ColumnOptions.Join
member.summary: Options for joining a sub-collection.

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.JoinOptions
member.summary: Options for joining tables.
member.param: The alias for the sub-collection.
The path to the array sub-collection.
The columns to include in the join.
The aggregation options for the join.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.JoinOptions.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Universe.Builder.Options.AggregationOption})
member.summary: Options for joining tables.
member.param: The alias for the sub-collection.
The path to the array sub-collection.
The columns to include in the join.
The aggregation options for the join.

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.JoinOptions.Alias
member.summary: The alias for the sub-collection.

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.JoinOptions.ArrayPath
member.summary: The path to the array sub-collection.

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.JoinOptions.Columns
member.summary: The columns to include in the join.

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.JoinOptions.Aggregates
member.summary: The aggregation options for the join.

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst
member.summary: Create a generic query string from a list of parameters. The first parameter created will be the first parameter in the where clause of the query string.
member.param: Column name
Value for the where clause associated with the Column
Where operator (eg AND / OR)
Boolean expression operator
Alias for the collection containing the column. Default is 'c'

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst.#ctor(System.String,System.Object,Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Where,Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator,System.String)
member.summary: Create a generic query string from a list of parameters. The first parameter created will be the first parameter in the where clause of the query string.
member.param: Column name
Value for the where clause associated with the Column
Where operator (eg AND / OR)
Boolean expression operator
Alias for the collection containing the column. Default is 'c'

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst.Column
member.summary: Column name

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst.Value
member.summary: Value for the where clause associated with the Column

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst.Where
member.summary: Where operator (eg AND / OR)

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst.Operator
member.summary: Boolean expression operator

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst.Alias
member.summary: Alias for the collection containing the column. Default is 'c'

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst.CatalystId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the catalyst, used to differentiate between multiple catalysts in a query.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst.RuleViolations
member.summary: Creates a list of rule violations when creating a CosmosDb query catalyst

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.QueryExecutionStrategy
member.summary: Supported query execution strategies

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.QueryExecutionStrategy.Direct
member.summary: Direct execution strategy for simple queries

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.QueryExecutionStrategy.Gateway
member.summary: Gateway mode strategy for complex queries and fallbacks

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.QueryExecutionStrategy.VectorSearch
member.summary: Specialized strategy for vector search queries

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.QueryExecutionStrategyExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for QueryExecutionStrategy

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.QueryExecutionStrategyExtensions.ToStrategyName(Universe.Builder.Options.QueryExecutionStrategy)
member.summary: Get the strategy name as used internally

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.QueryHints
member.summary: Query hints for optimization

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.QueryHints.#ctor(System.Nullable{Universe.Builder.Options.QueryExecutionStrategy},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Query hints for optimization

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.QueryHints.ToContextHints
member.summary: Convert to context hints dictionary

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.Q
member.summary: Query Options

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Limits
member.summary: Query Limits

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Limits.MaxVectorItems
member.summary: Maximum number of items return for vector search queries

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Limits.MaxItems
member.summary: Maximum number of items to return

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Limits.MaxRU
member.summary: Maximum number of RU per query

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Limits.MaxContinuationTokenKb
member.summary: Maximum response continuation token size in KB

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Page
member.summary: Page definition for paginated queries

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Page.Size
member.summary: Number of items requested for the page.

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Page.ContinuationToken
member.summary: Continuation token returned by Cosmos DB.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Page.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Create a paginated query request.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Page.Deconstruct(System.Int32@,System.String@)
member.summary: Deconstruct a page request.

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Where
member.summary: AND / OR where clause operators

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator
member.summary: Equality operator

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.Eq
member.summary: Equality check. Generates: c.[Column] = @param. Value: scalar to compare against.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.NotEq
member.summary: Inequality check. Generates: c.[Column] != @param. Value: scalar to compare against.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.Gt
member.summary: Greater than comparison. Generates: c.[Column] > @param. Value: scalar to compare against.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.Gte
member.summary: Greater than or equal comparison. Generates: c.[Column] >= @param. Value: scalar to compare against.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.Lt
member.summary: Less than comparison. Generates: c.[Column] < @param. Value: scalar to compare against.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.Lte
member.summary: Less than or equal comparison. Generates: c.[Column] <= @param. Value: scalar to compare against.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.In
member.summary: Checks if a document's array field contains a scalar value. Generates: ARRAY_CONTAINS(c.[Column], @param). Value: the scalar to search for.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.NotIn
member.summary: Checks if a document's array field does NOT contain a scalar value. Generates: NOT ARRAY_CONTAINS(c.[Column], @param). Value: the scalar to search for.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.Contains
member.summary: Checks if a user-provided collection contains the document's scalar field value (SQL IN equivalent). Generates: ARRAY_CONTAINS(@param, c.[Column]). Value: an IEnumerable collection (not string) of values to match against.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.NotContains
member.summary: Checks if a user-provided collection does NOT contain the document's scalar field value (SQL NOT IN equivalent). Generates: NOT ARRAY_CONTAINS(@param, c.[Column]). Value: an IEnumerable collection (not string) of values to match against.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.Len
member.summary: Checks the length of a document's array field. Generates: ARRAY_LENGTH(c.[Column]) = @param. Value: integer length to compare against.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.Like
member.summary: Pattern matching with wildcards. Generates: c.[Column] LIKE @param. Value: string pattern with '%' wildcard(s).

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.NotLike
member.summary: Negated pattern matching with wildcards. Generates: c.[Column] NOT LIKE @param. Value: string pattern with '%' wildcard(s).

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.Defined
member.summary: Checks if a property is defined on the document. Generates: IS_DEFINED(c.[Column]). Value: not required (must be null).

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.NotDefined
member.summary: Checks if a property is NOT defined on the document. Generates: NOT IS_DEFINED(c.[Column]). Value: not required (must be null).

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.VectorDistance
member.summary: Vector similarity search. Generates: VectorDistance(c.[Column], @param) in SELECT and ORDER BY. Value: float[] representing the query vector.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.FTContains
member.summary: Full-text contains check for a single keyword. Generates: FullTextContains(c.[Column], @param). Value: string keyword to search for.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.NotFTContains
member.summary: Negated full-text contains check. Generates: NOT FullTextContains(c.[Column], @param). Value: string keyword to search for.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.FTContainsAll
member.summary: Full-text check that ALL keywords are present. Generates: FullTextContainsAll(c.[Column], @param). Value: string[] of keywords that must all be present.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.NotFTContainsAll
member.summary: Negated full-text check for all keywords. Generates: NOT FullTextContainsAll(c.[Column], @param). Value: string[] of keywords.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.FTContainsAny
member.summary: Full-text check that ANY keyword is present. Generates: FullTextContainsAny(c.[Column], @param). Value: string[] of keywords where at least one must be present.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.NotFTContainsAny
member.summary: Negated full-text check for any keyword. Generates: NOT FullTextContainsAny(c.[Column], @param). Value: string[] of keywords.

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator.FTScore
member.summary: Full-text relevance scoring for ORDER BY RANK. Generates: FullTextScore(c.[Column], @param) in ORDER BY. Value: string[] of search terms. Requires ColumnOptions.Top.

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Aggregate
member.summary: Aggregation functions

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Aggregate.Count
member.summary: Count

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Aggregate.Sum
member.summary: Sum

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Aggregate.Min
member.summary: Min

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Aggregate.Max
member.summary: Max

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Aggregate.Avg
member.summary: Avg

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Sorting.Direction.ASC
member.summary: Ascending

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Sorting.Direction.DESC
member.summary: Descending

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Sorting.Direction.WEIGHTED
member.summary: Weighted sorting direction

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.UniverseSerializer.NamingPolicy
member.summary: The naming policy used for property name serialization and query column name conversion.

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.Cluster
member.summary: Clusters are group of Catalysts that are joined by a Where operator (eg AND / OR). This will divide the where clause into multiple groups.
member.param: Catalysts under one group / cluster
Where operator (eg AND / OR)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.Cluster.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst},Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Where)
member.summary: Clusters are group of Catalysts that are joined by a Where operator (eg AND / OR). This will divide the where clause into multiple groups.
member.param: Catalysts under one group / cluster
Where operator (eg AND / OR)

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.Cluster.Catalysts
member.summary: Catalysts under one group / cluster

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.Cluster.Where
member.summary: Where operator (eg AND / OR)

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1
member.summary: Fluent query builder for Galaxy queries. Create via galaxy.Query() extension method.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.Cluster(System.Action{Universe.Builder.ClusterBuilder})
member.summary: Add a cluster of filter conditions using a builder lambda.
member.remarks: Azure Cosmos DB column names are case-sensitive. When a naming policy is configured on , column names are automatically transformed to match the serialized document field names.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.Or
member.summary: The next cluster will be joined with OR.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.And
member.summary: The next cluster will be joined with AND.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.Select(System.String[])
member.summary: Specify which columns to select.
member.remarks: Azure Cosmos DB column names are case-sensitive. When a naming policy is configured on , column names are automatically transformed to match the serialized document field names.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.Select``1
member.summary: Specify which columns to select based on the public properties of a projection type.
member.remarks: Extracts all public instance property names from , excluding properties marked with . When a naming policy is configured on , column names are automatically transformed to match the serialized document field names. This method is additive — it can be combined with to include additional columns.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.Distinct
member.summary: Return only distinct results.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.Top(System.Int32)
member.summary: Limit the number of results returned.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.OrderBy(System.String,Universe.Builder.Options.Sorting.Direction,System.String)
member.summary: Add a sort order.
member.remarks: Azure Cosmos DB column names are case-sensitive. When a naming policy is configured on , column names are automatically transformed to match the serialized document field names.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.OrderByDescending(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add descending sort order on a column.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.WithWeights(System.String)
member.summary: Add weighted sorting for RRF ranking.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.Aggregate(System.String,Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Aggregate)
member.summary: Add an aggregation function.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.GroupBy(System.String[])
member.summary: Add GROUP BY columns.
member.remarks: Azure Cosmos DB column names are case-sensitive. When a naming policy is configured on , column names are automatically transformed to match the serialized document field names.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.Paged(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Enable pagination with specified page size.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.Join(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Universe.Builder.Options.AggregationOption})
member.summary: Configure a JOIN on a sub-collection array.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.WithHints(Universe.Builder.Options.QueryHints)
member.summary: Provide query optimization hints.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.ToListAsync
member.summary: Execute the query and return a list of results.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.ToListAsync``1
member.summary: Execute the query and return a list of results projected to a different type.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.GetAsync
member.summary: Execute the query and return the first matching result.
member.remarks: Only filter conditions (clusters) and column selection (Select) are applied. Top, Distinct, Aggregate, GroupBy, sorting, Join, Paged, and WithHints options are ignored. Use ToListAsync for those features.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.GetAsync``1
member.summary: Execute the query and return the first matching result projected to a different type.
member.remarks: Only filter conditions (clusters) and column selection (Select) are applied. Top, Distinct, Aggregate, GroupBy, sorting, Join, Paged, and WithHints options are ignored. Use ToListAsync for those features.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Orbit`1.GenerateQuery
member.summary: Generate the SQL query without executing it.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.UniverseBuilder.ValidateWeightValue(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a weight value for ORDER BY RANK RRF contains only safe numeric content. Weight values should be comma-separated decimal numbers, optionally bracket-wrapped (e.g., "0.7, 0.3").

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.DirectQueryStrategy
member.summary: Direct execution strategy for simple queries

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.GatewayQueryStrategy
member.summary: Gateway mode strategy for complex queries and when direct mode fails

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.IQueryExecutionStrategy
member.summary: Defines the contract for query execution strategies

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.IQueryExecutionStrategy.Name
member.summary: Strategy name for identification

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.IQueryExecutionStrategy.CanHandle(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.QueryDefinition,Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryContext)
member.summary: Determines if this strategy can handle the given query

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.IQueryExecutionStrategy.Priority
member.summary: Gets the priority of this strategy (higher = more preferred)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.IQueryExecutionStrategy.ExecuteAsync``1(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.Container,Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.QueryDefinition,Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryContext,System.Boolean,Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner)
member.summary: Executes the query and returns results with gravity information

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType
member.summary: Types of queries supported in Universe

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType.Simple
member.summary: Simple queries without complex operations

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType.Aggregation
member.summary: Aggregation queries for summarizing data

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType.VectorSearch
member.summary: Vector search queries for high-dimensional data

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType.FullTextSearch
member.summary: Full-text search queries for unstructured text data

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType.HybridSearch
member.summary: Hybrid search queries combining multiple techniques

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType.Join
member.summary: Join queries for combining data from multiple sources

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType.Complex
member.summary: Complex queries involving advanced logic and multiple steps

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuningRecommendations
member.summary: Recommendations for query tuning based on collected statistics

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuningRecommendations.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Recommendations for query tuning based on collected statistics

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics
member.summary: Represents performance metrics for a single query execution

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics.QueryHash
member.summary: Hash of the query structure (not the raw query text)

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics.Type
member.summary: Detected query type

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics.RU
member.summary: Request Units consumed

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics.ExecutionTime
member.summary: Total execution time

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics.ResultCount
member.summary: Number of results returned

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics.Success
member.summary: Whether the query succeeded

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp of execution (UTC)

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics.StrategyUsed
member.summary: Strategy used for execution

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics.HintsUsed
member.summary: Query hints that were applied

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryStrategySelector
member.summary: Selects the best execution strategy for a given query

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryStrategySelector.#ctor(Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner)
member.summary: Selects the best execution strategy for a given query

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner
member.summary: Provides query tuning recommendations based on query type and historical performance

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner.ParameterNamePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
@\\w+
Explanation:
○ Match '@'.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner.RecordExecution(Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics)
member.summary: Record a query execution for learning

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner.GetRecommendations(Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType)
member.summary: Get recommendations for a query type

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner.ComputeQueryHash(Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryContext,System.String)
member.summary: Compute hash for query pattern recognition

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner.GetRuleBasedRecommendations(Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType)
member.summary: Fallback to rule-based recommendations (v3.1.x behavior)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner.CalculateOptimalHints(System.Collections.Generic.List{Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics})
member.summary: Calculate optimal hints based on historical performance

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner.DetermineOptimalStrategy(System.Collections.Generic.List{Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics})
member.summary: Determine which strategy performs best for this query type

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner.GetHintsSignature(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Generate a signature for a set of hints (for grouping)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner.GenerateHints(Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryType)
member.summary: Rule-based hint generation (v3.1.x logic kept as fallback)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryTuner.LoadPersistedStatisticsAsync
member.summary: Load persisted statistics on startup

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.FileStatisticsStorage
member.summary: File-based storage (JSON persistence)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.FileStatisticsStorage.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Create a new file-based statistics storage
member.param: Optional custom file path. If null, uses a platform-aware default (temp directory on Azure, application directory otherwise). Warning: do not pass a value derived from untrusted user input; the path is used directly for file and directory creation after normalization via .

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.FileStatisticsStorage.ResolveDefaultPath
member.summary:
Resolves the default file path based on the runtime environment. On Azure (Functions / App Service), uses local temp storage to avoid SMB-mounted paths where file locking can be unreliable.
Azure caveat: Temp directories are local to the VM instance and are cleared on cold starts, scale events, or platform updates. The tuner starts fresh in these cases. For durable persistence across restarts, provide an explicit filePath pointing to a writable local disk.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.FileStatisticsStorage.SaveAsync(Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics)
member.summary: Save a query execution statistic

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.FileStatisticsStorage.LoadRecentAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Load recent statistics

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.FileStatisticsStorage.GetByQueryHashAsync(System.String,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Load statistics for a specific query hash within a time window

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.FileStatisticsStorage.ClearOldAsync(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Clear old statistics (older than specified timespan)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.FileStatisticsStorage.LoadAllAsync
member.summary: Load all statistics from file

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.InMemoryStatisticsStorage
member.summary: In-memory storage (default, no persistence across restarts)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.InMemoryStatisticsStorage.SaveAsync(Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics)
member.summary: Save is a no-op for in-memory storage (handled by QueryTuner's queue)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.InMemoryStatisticsStorage.LoadRecentAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Load is a no-op for in-memory storage (QueryTuner maintains its own queue)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.InMemoryStatisticsStorage.GetByQueryHashAsync(System.String,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: GetByQueryHash is a no-op for in-memory storage (QueryTuner maintains its own queue)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.InMemoryStatisticsStorage.ClearOldAsync(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Clear is a no-op for in-memory storage

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.IQueryStatisticsStorage
member.summary: Interface for persisting query statistics

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.IQueryStatisticsStorage.SaveAsync(Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics)
member.summary: Save a query execution statistic

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.IQueryStatisticsStorage.LoadRecentAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Load recent statistics

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.IQueryStatisticsStorage.GetByQueryHashAsync(System.String,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Load statistics for a specific query hash within a time window
member.param: The query hash to filter by
Time window from now to look back
member.returns: Statistics matching the query hash within the time window

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.IQueryStatisticsStorage.ClearOldAsync(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Clear old statistics (older than specified timespan)

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.PlatformDetection
member.summary: Detects the runtime platform to determine safe default storage paths. Azure App Service and Azure Functions mount the application directory on Azure Files (SMB), which does not support the POSIX locking semantics required by SQLite WAL mode and can cause unreliable file locking for JSON persistence.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.PlatformDetection.IsAzureEnvironment
member.summary: Detects Azure App Service or Azure Functions by checking well-known environment variables. Returns true when WEBSITE_INSTANCE_ID is set (App Service / Functions on Azure), or when FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME is set and AZURE_FUNCTIONS_ENVIRONMENT is not "Development" (to avoid treating local Functions development as Azure).

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.PlatformDetection.GetLocalTempDirectory
member.summary: Resolves a platform-aware local temp directory. Prefers TMP / TEMP environment variables (which on Azure point to SSD-backed local storage), falling back to .

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.PlatformDetection.ValidateStoragePath(System.String)
member.summary: Validates and normalizes a storage file path. Resolves the path via , ensures the result is rooted (absolute), and rejects paths containing null bytes.
member.param: The raw file path to validate.
member.exception: Thrown when the path is empty, contains null bytes, or cannot be resolved to a rooted path.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.PlatformDetection.SetRestrictivePermissions(System.String)
member.summary: Sets restrictive permissions (owner-only) on Unix-like systems to prevent other users from reading statistics. No-op on Windows where NTFS ACLs are used instead.

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.SqliteStatisticsStorage
member.summary: SQLite-based storage for query statistics with high-performance features: - WAL mode for concurrent read/write - Non-blocking fire-and-forget writes - Batched inserts for efficiency - Auto-cleanup of old data - Schema versioning for safe upgrades

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.SqliteStatisticsStorage.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new SQLite statistics storage
member.param: Path to the SQLite database file. If null, uses a platform-aware default (temp directory on Azure, application directory otherwise). Warning: do not pass a value derived from untrusted user input; the path is used directly for file and directory creation after normalization via .
Number of days to retain statistics (minimum 1). Older records are auto-cleaned.
Number of records to batch before flushing to database (minimum 1).
Interval in seconds between automatic flushes (minimum 1).

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.SqliteStatisticsStorage.ResolveDefaultPath
member.summary:
Resolves the default database path based on the runtime environment. On Azure (Functions / App Service), uses local temp storage to avoid SMB-mounted paths where SQLite WAL mode is unsupported.
Azure caveat: Temp directories are local to the VM instance and are cleared on cold starts, scale events, or platform updates. The tuner starts fresh in these cases. For durable persistence across restarts, provide an explicit dbPath pointing to a writable local disk.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.SqliteStatisticsStorage.SaveAsync(Universe.Builder.Strategies.QueryExecutionStatistics)
member.summary: Queue a statistic for saving (non-blocking)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.SqliteStatisticsStorage.LoadRecentAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Load recent statistics from the database
member.exception: Thrown when the write lock cannot be acquired within the timeout period.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.SqliteStatisticsStorage.GetByQueryHashAsync(System.String,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Load statistics for a specific query hash within a time window
member.exception: Thrown when the write lock cannot be acquired within the timeout period.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.SqliteStatisticsStorage.ClearOldAsync(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Clear old statistics (older than specified timespan)
member.exception: Thrown when the write lock cannot be acquired within the timeout period.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.SqliteStatisticsStorage.FireAndForget(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Runs an async task fire-and-forget, logging any exceptions instead of leaving them unobserved.

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Strategies.Storage.SqliteStatisticsStorage.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose the storage, flushing any pending writes

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Strategies.VectorSearchStrategy
member.summary: Specialized strategy for vector search queries

member.name: M:Universe.Exception.UniverseException.#ctor
member.summary: Custom exception

member.name: M:Universe.Exception.UniverseException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Custom exception

member.name: M:Universe.Exception.UniverseException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Custom exception

member.name: T:Universe.Extensions.HintValueExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for safely converting hint values that may be JsonElement objects from deserialized JSON

member.name: M:Universe.Extensions.HintValueExtensions.ToInt(System.Object)
member.summary: Converts an object to int, handling both JsonElement (from deserialized JSON) and primitive types. Values are clamped to [0, 10000] to prevent unreasonable query option settings.

member.name: M:Universe.Extensions.HintValueExtensions.ToBool(System.Object)
member.summary: Converts an object to bool, handling both JsonElement (from deserialized JSON) and primitive types

member.name: T:Universe.Extensions.OrbitExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for creating fluent query builders on Galaxy instances.

member.name: M:Universe.Extensions.OrbitExtensions.Query``1(Universe.Interfaces.IGalaxy{``0})
member.summary: Create a fluent query builder for this Galaxy repository.

member.name: T:Universe.Extensions.CosmicEntityExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for ICosmicEntity

member.name: F:Universe.Extensions.CosmicEntityExtensions.MaxPartitionKeyLevels
member.summary: Maximum allowed partition key levels in Cosmos DB

member.name: M:Universe.Extensions.CosmicEntityExtensions.BuildPartitionKey(System.Type)
member.summary: Builds the partition key for the entity.

member.name: M:Universe.Extensions.CosmicEntityExtensions.BuildPartitionKey(Universe.Interfaces.ICosmicEntity)
member.summary: Builds the partition key values for the entity.

member.name: M:Universe.Extensions.CosmicEntityExtensions.PartitionKeys(Universe.Interfaces.ICosmicEntity)
member.summary: Builds the partition key values for the entity.

member.name: T:Universe.Extensions.ProjectionColumnExtractor
member.summary: Extracts column names from a type's public properties for use with . Results are cached per type for performance.

member.name: M:Universe.Extensions.ProjectionColumnExtractor.GetColumnNames``1
member.summary: Returns the public instance property names for the given type, excluding properties marked with .

member.name: T:Universe.Extensions.StringExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for string manipulation.

member.name: M:Universe.Extensions.StringExtensions.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ToLowerCamelCase
member.summary: Converts a string to lower camel case. This is a general-purpose utility. For query builder column names, prefer configuring a on which automatically transforms column names in queries to match serialized document field names.

member.name: T:Universe.Galaxy`1
member.summary: Inherit repositories to implement a more advanced Universe

member.name: M:Universe.Galaxy`1.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a new Galaxy with default settings

member.name: M:Universe.Galaxy`1.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},Universe.UniverseOptions,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a new Galaxy with custom Universe options

member.name: T:Universe.GalaxyBasic`1
member.summary: Inherit repositories to implement the very basic Universe

member.name: M:Universe.GalaxyBasic`1.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a new Galaxy with default settings

member.name: M:Universe.GalaxyBasic`1.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},Universe.UniverseOptions,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a new Galaxy with custom Universe options

member.name: T:Universe.GalaxyCore
member.summary: Base class for Universe implementations.

member.name: M:Universe.GalaxyCore.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initialize Galaxy core with Cosmos DB connection.
member.remarks: WARNING: Setting to true includes full query text and parameter values in Gravity responses. This may expose sensitive data (PII, filter values). Use only for debugging — never enable in production.

member.name: M:Universe.GalaxyCore.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},Universe.UniverseOptions,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initialize Galaxy core with Cosmos DB connection and custom Universe options.
member.remarks: WARNING: Setting to true includes full query text and parameter values in Gravity responses. This may expose sensitive data (PII, filter values). Use only for debugging — never enable in production.

member.name: T:Universe.GalaxyProcedure
member.summary: Inherit repositories to implement stored procedure administration and execution.
member.remarks: Stored procedure create, replace, and delete operations are administrative capabilities. Stored procedure body strings must come only from trusted, version-controlled or operator-approved sources.

member.name: M:Universe.GalaxyProcedure.#ctor(Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClient,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Inherit repositories to implement stored procedure administration and execution.
member.remarks: Stored procedure create, replace, and delete operations are administrative capabilities. Stored procedure body strings must come only from trusted, version-controlled or operator-approved sources.

member.name: M:Universe.GalaxyProcedure.Universe#Interfaces#IGalaxyProcedure#CreateSProc(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a stored procedure from trusted administrative JavaScript source.
member.remarks: The value is raw JavaScript executed by Cosmos DB and must come only from trusted, version-controlled or operator-approved sources.

member.name: M:Universe.GalaxyProcedure.Universe#Interfaces#IGalaxyProcedure#ReplaceSProc(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces a stored procedure with trusted administrative JavaScript source.
member.remarks: The value is raw JavaScript executed by Cosmos DB and must come only from trusted, version-controlled or operator-approved sources.

member.name: M:Universe.GalaxyProcedure.Universe#Interfaces#IGalaxyProcedure#DeleteSProc(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a stored procedure as an administrative operation.
member.remarks: Only trusted administrative code paths should call this method.

member.summary: Base interface for Cosmos Entities

member.name: P:Universe.Interfaces.ICosmicEntity.id
member.summary: Unique GUID

member.summary: UTC Date document was added

member.name: P:Universe.Interfaces.ICosmicEntity.ModifiedOn
member.summary: UTC Date document was modified.

member.name: P:Universe.Interfaces.ICosmicEntity.CountAggregate
member.summary: Represents the count of items in a query result.

member.name: T:Universe.Interfaces.CosmicEntity
member.summary: Base record for Cosmos Entities

member.summary: Get one model from the database

member.summary: Get one model from the database with a different type
Get list from the database with optional query optimization hints
Get list from the database with a different type
Get a paginated list from the database
Get a paginated list from the database
Generate SQL query without executing it

member.summary: Get one model from the database
member.param: Exact order of your defined partition keys

member.name: T:Universe.Interfaces.IGalaxyProcedure
member.summary: Stored procedure lifecycle and execution operations.
member.remarks: Stored procedure create, replace, and delete operations are administrative capabilities. Stored procedure body strings must come only from trusted, version-controlled or operator-approved sources.

member.name: M:Universe.Interfaces.IGalaxyProcedure.ExecSProc``1(System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Execute a stored procedure

member.name: M:Universe.Interfaces.IGalaxyProcedure.CreateSProc(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a stored procedure.
member.remarks: Administrative operation. The value is raw JavaScript executed by Cosmos DB and must come only from trusted, version-controlled or operator-approved sources.

member.name: M:Universe.Interfaces.IGalaxyProcedure.ReadSProc(System.String)
member.summary: Read a stored procedure

member.name: M:Universe.Interfaces.IGalaxyProcedure.ReplaceSProc(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replace a stored procedure.
member.remarks: Administrative operation. The value is raw JavaScript executed by Cosmos DB and must come only from trusted, version-controlled or operator-approved sources.

member.name: M:Universe.Interfaces.IGalaxyProcedure.DeleteSProc(System.String)
member.summary: Delete a stored procedure.
member.remarks: Administrative operation. Only trusted administrative code paths should call this method.

member.name: M:Universe.Interfaces.IGalaxyProcedure.ListSProcs
member.summary: List stored procedures (returns list of names)

member.name: T:Universe.Response.Gravity
member.summary: Query execution response
member.param: RU consumed
Pagination Token
Query that was executed

member.name: M:Universe.Response.Gravity.#ctor(System.Double,System.String,System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Object}}})
member.summary: Query execution response
member.param: RU consumed
Pagination Token
Query that was executed

member.name: P:Universe.Response.Gravity.RU
member.summary: RU consumed

member.name: P:Universe.Response.Gravity.ContinuationToken
member.summary: Pagination Token

member.name: P:Universe.Response.Gravity.Query
member.summary: Query that was executed

member.name: T:Universe.UniverseOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for Universe query optimization

member.name: P:Universe.UniverseOptions.StatisticsStorage
member.summary: Storage backend for query statistics. Defaults to InMemoryStatisticsStorage.

member.name: P:Universe.UniverseOptions.AutoProvisionContainers
member.summary: Whether repository construction should create the Cosmos database and container if they do not exist. Defaults to true for backward compatibility.

member.name: M:Universe.UniverseOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Creates default Universe options with in-memory storage

member.name: M:Universe.UniverseOptions.WithAutoProvisioning(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables or disables automatic Cosmos database/container provisioning during repository construction. Disable this in production environments where infrastructure is managed separately.
member.param: True to create missing containers automatically; false to use existing containers only.
member.returns: The same UniverseOptions instance for fluent configuration.

member.name: M:Universe.UniverseOptions.WithFilePersistence(System.String)
member.summary: Creates Universe options with file-based persistence (JSON)
member.param: Optional custom path for statistics file. If null, uses default location.

member.name: M:Universe.UniverseOptions.WithSqlitePersistence(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates Universe options with SQLite-based persistence for high-performance statistics storage. Features WAL mode for concurrent access, batched writes, and automatic cleanup.
member.param: Optional custom path for the SQLite database file. If null, uses 'universe-stats.db' in the application directory.
Number of days to retain statistics. Older records are automatically cleaned up. Default is 7 days.
Number of records to batch before flushing to database. Default is 10.
Interval in seconds between automatic flushes. Default is 5 seconds.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ParameterNamePattern_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the ParameterNamePattern method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ParameterNamePattern_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ParameterNamePattern_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ParameterNamePattern_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ParameterNamePattern_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ParameterNamePattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ParameterNamePattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ParameterNamePattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ParameterNamePattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IsWordChar(System.Char)
member.summary: Determines whether the character is part of the [\w] set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.WordCategoriesMask
member.summary: Provides a mask of Unicode categories that combine to form [\w].

member.name: P:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.WordCharBitmap
member.summary: Gets a bitmap for whether each character 0 through 127 is in [\w]
